<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en-GB">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>S7EN Platinum Ltd — Camden High Street Stays</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..144,300;0,9..144,400;0,9..144,500;0,9..144,600;1,9..144,400&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#0a0a0b;
    --panel:#151317;
    --panel-2:#1c191d;
    --gold:#b8912f;
    --gold-bright:#d9b45c;
    --champagne:#e9dfc4;
    --bone:#f3f1ec;
    --steel:#8f8d92;
    --hair: rgba(184,145,47,0.35);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    background:var(--ink);
    color:var(--bone);
    font-family:'Manrope',sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  a{color:inherit; text-decoration:none;}
  img{display:block; max-width:100%;}

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'Manrope',sans-serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:0.72rem;
    letter-spacing:0.28em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold-bright);
  }

  /* ---------- ARCH DIVIDER (signature element) ---------- */
  .arch{
    width:100%;
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    pointer-events:none;
    user-select:none;
  }
  .arch svg{ width:min(680px, 90vw); height:auto; }

  /* ---------- HEADER / NAV ---------- */
  header{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:50;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    padding:1.1rem clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    background:linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,10,11,0.92), rgba(10,10,11,0));
    backdrop-filter:blur(2px);
  }
  .brand-mark{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.7rem; }
  .brand-mark img{ height:38px; width:38px; border-radius:50%; }
  .brand-mark span{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif; font-weight:500; font-size:1.05rem;
    letter-spacing:0.02em; color:var(--champagne);
  }
  .brand-mark small{ display:block; font-size:0.6rem; letter-spacing:0.22em; color:var(--steel); font-weight:600; }
  nav a{
    font-size:0.8rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.05em; color:var(--bone); opacity:0.75;
    margin-left:2rem; transition:opacity 0.2s;
  }
  nav a:hover{ opacity:1; color:var(--gold-bright); }
  nav{ display:flex; align-items:center; }

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    min-height:100svh;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    text-align:center;
    padding:8rem 1.5rem 4rem;
    position:relative;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% -10%, rgba(184,145,47,0.16), transparent 55%),
      var(--ink);
  }
  .hero .crest{
    width:96px; height:96px; border-radius:50%; margin-bottom:1.8rem;
    box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--hair), 0 20px 60px rgba(184,145,47,0.15);
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(14px);
    animation:riseIn 0.9s ease forwards 0.15s;
  }
  .hero .eyebrow{ opacity:0; animation:riseIn 0.9s ease forwards 0.35s; }
  h1{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif;
    font-weight:400;
    font-size:clamp(2.6rem, 7.5vw, 5.6rem);
    line-height:1.02;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
    color:var(--champagne);
    margin:1.1rem 0 0;
    max-width:16ch;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px);
    animation:riseIn 1s ease forwards 0.5s;
  }
  h1 em{ font-style:italic; color:var(--gold-bright); }
  .hero p.lede{
    font-size:clamp(1rem, 1.6vw, 1.15rem);
    color:var(--steel);
    max-width:46ch;
    margin:1.6rem 0 2.4rem;
    line-height:1.6;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px);
    animation:riseIn 1s ease forwards 0.7s;
  }
  .hero .arch{
    opacity:0; animation:riseIn 1.2s ease forwards 0.85s;
  }
  .cta-row{
    display:flex; gap:0.9rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px);
    animation:riseIn 1s ease forwards 0.95s;
  }
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.5rem;
    padding:0.85rem 1.6rem;
    font-size:0.85rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.04em;
    border-radius:2px;
    transition:transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease, background 0.25s ease;
  }
  .btn-gold{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-bright), var(--gold));
    color:#161212;
  }
  .btn-gold:hover{ transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(184,145,47,0.35); }
  .btn-ghost{
    border:1px solid var(--hair); color:var(--champagne);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover{ border-color:var(--gold-bright); color:var(--gold-bright); }

  @keyframes riseIn{ to{ opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }

  /* ---------- INTRO STRIP ---------- */
  .strip{
    max-width:920px; margin:0 auto; padding:5rem 1.5rem 2rem; text-align:center;
  }
  .strip h2{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif; font-weight:400; font-style:italic;
    font-size:clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2rem); color:var(--bone); line-height:1.5;
  }
  .strip h2 .gold{ color:var(--gold-bright); font-style:normal; font-weight:500; }

  /* ---------- LISTINGS ---------- */
  .listings{ max-width:1180px; margin:0 auto; padding:3rem 1.5rem 6rem; }
  .listings > .head{ text-align:center; margin-bottom:3.2rem; }
  .listings > .head h3{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif; font-weight:400; font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.6vw,2.6rem);
    color:var(--champagne); margin-top:0.6rem;
  }

  .card{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr; gap:0;
    background:var(--panel);
    border:1px solid rgba(184,145,47,0.14);
    margin-bottom:2.2rem;
    overflow:hidden;
    opacity:0; transform:translateY(28px);
    transition:opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease;
  }
  .card.in-view{ opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); }
  .card:nth-child(even){ grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr; }
  .card:nth-child(even) .card-media{ order:2; }
  .card:nth-child(even) .card-body{ order:1; }

  .card-media{ background:#000; min-height:320px; }
  .card-media .main-shot{
    width:100%; height:100%; min-height:320px; object-fit:cover; cursor:zoom-in;
    transition:filter 0.25s ease;
  }
  .card-media img:hover{ filter:brightness(1.08); }
  @media (min-width:821px){
    .card-media{ height:100%; }
  }

  /* ---------- LIGHTBOX ---------- */
  .lightbox{
    position:fixed; inset:0; z-index:200; background:rgba(6,6,7,0.94);
    display:none; align-items:center; justify-content:center; padding:2rem;
    cursor:zoom-out;
  }
  .lightbox.open{ display:flex; }
  .lightbox img{ max-width:min(1100px, 92vw); max-height:88vh; object-fit:contain; box-shadow:0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); }
  .lightbox .lb-caption{
    position:absolute; bottom:1.5rem; left:0; right:0; text-align:center;
    font-size:0.8rem; letter-spacing:0.04em; color:var(--steel);
  }
  .lightbox .lb-close{
    position:absolute; top:1.3rem; right:1.6rem; font-size:1.6rem; color:var(--champagne);
    width:2.4rem; height:2.4rem; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  }

  .card-body{ padding:clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.8rem); display:flex; flex-direction:column; }
  .card-body .tag{
    font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--gold-bright); margin-bottom:0.9rem;
  }
  .card-body h4{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif; font-weight:500; font-size:clamp(1.4rem,2.4vw,1.85rem);
    color:var(--champagne); margin-bottom:0.9rem; line-height:1.15;
  }
  .card-body p.desc{
    color:var(--steel); font-size:0.95rem; line-height:1.65; margin-bottom:1.4rem;
  }
  .facts{
    display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.6rem 1.4rem;
    padding:1rem 0; margin-bottom:1.4rem;
    border-top:1px solid var(--hair); border-bottom:1px solid var(--hair);
  }
  .facts .fact{ font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--bone); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.45rem; }
  .facts .fact svg{ width:14px; height:14px; stroke:var(--gold-bright); flex-shrink:0; }
  .rating-row{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem; margin-bottom:1.6rem; }
  .rating-row .stars{ color:var(--gold-bright); font-size:0.95rem; letter-spacing:0.05em; }
  .rating-row .rn{ font-size:0.82rem; color:var(--steel); }
  .rating-row .new-badge{
    font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:#161212; background:var(--gold-bright); padding:0.25rem 0.6rem; border-radius:2px;
  }
  .card-body .btn-row{ margin-top:auto; }

  /* ---------- ABOUT / TRUST ---------- */
  .about{
    background:var(--panel-2);
    padding:6rem 1.5rem;
    border-top:1px solid rgba(184,145,47,0.14);
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,145,47,0.14);
  }
  .about-inner{
    max-width:980px; margin:0 auto;
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:3.5rem;
    align-items:start;
  }
  .about-inner h3{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif; font-weight:400; font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3vw,2.3rem);
    color:var(--champagne); line-height:1.2; margin-top:0.6rem;
  }
  .about-inner p{ color:var(--steel); line-height:1.75; margin-top:1rem; font-size:0.98rem; }
  .stat-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:1.8rem; }
  .stat{ border-left:1px solid var(--hair); padding-left:1.1rem; }
  .stat .num{ font-family:'Fraunces', serif; font-size:2.1rem; color:var(--gold-bright); font-weight:500; }
  .stat .label{ font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--steel); letter-spacing:0.03em; margin-top:0.3rem; }

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{ padding:4rem 1.5rem 2.5rem; text-align:center; }
  footer .brand-mark{ justify-content:center; margin-bottom:1.4rem; }
  footer p{ color:var(--steel); font-size:0.85rem; max-width:40ch; margin:0 auto 1.6rem; line-height:1.6; }
  footer .fine{ font-size:0.72rem; color:#5c5a5e; letter-spacing:0.03em; }

  @media (max-width:820px){
    .card, .card:nth-child(even){ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    .card-media, .card:nth-child(even) .card-media{ order:1 !important; min-height:260px; }
    .card-body, .card:nth-child(even) .card-body{ order:2 !important; }
    .about-inner{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
    nav a{ margin-left:1.1rem; font-size:0.72rem; }
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    *{ animation-duration:0.01ms !important; transition-duration:0.01ms !important; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="brand-mark">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="S7EN Platinum Ltd">
    <div>
      <span>S7EN Platinum</span>
      <small>CAMDEN HIGH STREET</small>
    </div>
  </div>
  <nav>
    <a href="#stays">The Stays</a>
    <a href="#about">About</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<section class="hero">
  <img class="crest" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="S7EN Platinum Ltd crest">
  <span class="eyebrow">S7EN Platinum Ltd · Short Stays</span>
  <h1>Camden High Street,<br><em>three ways to stay.</em></h1>
  <p class="lede">A small, hand-finished collection of apartments set directly on Camden High Street — steps from the market, the canal and KOKO, and run by a host who lives and works in the neighbourhood.</p>
  <div class="arch">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 680 60" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M2 58C2 58 130 4 340 4C550 4 678 58 678 58" stroke="url(#g1)" stroke-width="1.4"/>
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="g1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="680" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
          <stop stop-color="#b8912f" stop-opacity="0"/>
          <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#d9b45c"/>
          <stop offset="1" stop-color="#b8912f" stop-opacity="0"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="cta-row">
    <a class="btn btn-gold" href="#stays">View the three stays</a>
    <a class="btn btn-ghost" href="#about">About S7EN Platinum</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="strip">
  <h2>Same postcode. Same host. <span class="gold">Three different moods</span> — from a compact studio opposite KOKO to a two-bed sleeping four above the market noise.</h2>
</div>

<section class="listings" id="stays">
  <div class="head">
    <span class="eyebrow">The Collection</span>
    <h3>Pick your Camden</h3>
  </div>

  <!-- Listing 1 -->
  <article class="card">
    <div class="card-media">
      <img class="main-shot" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Camden High St Modern Stay — living room">
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="tag">The Two-Bedder</div>
      <h4>Camden High St Modern Stay</h4>
      <div class="rating-row">
        <span class="stars">★★★★★</span>
        <span class="rn">4.64 · 14 reviews</span>
      </div>
      <p class="desc">A calm, contemporary flat above the buzz, with a proper bedroom and a sofa bed in the living room for a fifth pair of hands. Built for a small group or a family who want space to spread out after a day at the market.</p>
      <div class="facts">
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M3 12l9-9 9 9M5 10v10h14V10" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>4 guests</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M4 18v-6a2 2 0 012-2h12a2 2 0 012 2v6M4 18h16M4 18v2M20 18v2" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>1 bed + sofa bed</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="3" stroke-width="1.8"/><path d="M5 21v-2a7 7 0 0114 0v2" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>Self check-in</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M4.5 12.5a3 3 0 116-1M13.5 11.5a3 3 0 116-1M8 18c0-2.5 1.8-4 4-4s4 1.5 4 4" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>Pets welcome</span>
      </div>
      <div class="btn-row">
        <a class="btn btn-gold" href="https://www.airbnb.co.uk/rooms/1643174157565138711" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View &amp; book on Airbnb</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </article>

  <!-- Listing 2 -->
  <article class="card">
    <div class="card-media">
      <img class="main-shot" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Camden High Street Modern Studio — bedroom and kitchenette">
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="tag">The Studio</div>
      <h4>Camden High Street Modern Studio</h4>
      <div class="rating-row">
        <span class="stars">★★★★☆</span>
        <span class="rn">4.33 · 18 reviews</span>
      </div>
      <p class="desc">A tight, newly renovated studio directly opposite KOKO — the smallest footprint in the collection and the best for a solo trip or a couple who'd rather spend their budget on gig tickets than square footage.</p>
      <div class="facts">
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M3 12l9-9 9 9M5 10v10h14V10" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>2 guests</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M4 18v-6a2 2 0 012-2h12a2 2 0 012 2v6M4 18h16M4 18v2M20 18v2" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>1 bed, studio layout</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="3" stroke-width="1.8"/><path d="M5 21v-2a7 7 0 0114 0v2" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>Self check-in</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M12 21s-7-4.5-9.5-9A5.5 5.5 0 0112 6a5.5 5.5 0 019.5 6c-2.5 4.5-9.5 9-9.5 9z" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>Opposite KOKO</span>
      </div>
      <div class="btn-row">
        <a class="btn btn-gold" href="https://www.airbnb.co.uk/rooms/1654525086179030494" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View &amp; book on Airbnb</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </article>

  <!-- Listing 3 -->
  <article class="card">
    <div class="card-media">
      <img class="main-shot" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Camden High Street Cozy Condo — living room">
    </div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="tag">The Newcomer</div>
      <h4>Camden High Street Cozy Condo</h4>
      <div class="rating-row">
        <span class="new-badge">New listing</span>
        <span class="rn">Host rated 4.47 across 32 reviews</span>
      </div>
      <p class="desc">The newest addition — a king bed plus a sofa bed, a proper kitchen, and a short walk to the canal, Primrose Hill and King's Cross. No reviews yet on this address, but the same host behind it has three years of five-star form.</p>
      <div class="facts">
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M3 12l9-9 9 9M5 10v10h14V10" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>4 guests</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M4 18v-6a2 2 0 012-2h12a2 2 0 012 2v6M4 18h16M4 18v2M20 18v2" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>King bed + sofa bed</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="3" stroke-width="1.8"/><path d="M5 21v-2a7 7 0 0114 0v2" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>Self check-in</span>
        <span class="fact"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M4.5 12.5a3 3 0 116-1M13.5 11.5a3 3 0 116-1M8 18c0-2.5 1.8-4 4-4s4 1.5 4 4" stroke-width="1.8"/></svg>Pets welcome</span>
      </div>
      <div class="btn-row">
        <a class="btn btn-gold" href="https://www.airbnb.co.uk/rooms/1723541778749307685" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View &amp; book on Airbnb</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </article>
</section>

<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-inner">
    <div>
      <span class="eyebrow">About S7EN Platinum</span>
      <h3>Run by one host, on one street, by design.</h3>
      <p>S7EN Platinum Ltd keeps its whole collection on Camden High Street on purpose — it means faster response times, keys that are never far away, and a host who actually knows which café does the good coffee. Anas has hosted here for four months and carries a 100% response rate across all three addresses.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-grid">
      <div class="stat"><div class="num">3</div><div class="label">Addresses, all on Camden High Street</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="num">100%</div><div class="label">Host response rate</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="num">4.47</div><div class="label">Average host rating across 32 reviews</div></div>
      <div class="stat"><div class="num">&lt;1hr</div><div class="label">Typical response time</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="brand-mark">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="S7EN Platinum Ltd">
    <div>
      <span>S7EN Platinum</span>
      <small>CAMDEN HIGH STREET</small>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p>All three stays are listed and booked directly through Airbnb. This page is an independent showcase and isn't affiliated with or endorsed by Airbnb.</p>
  <div class="fine">© 2026 S7EN Platinum Ltd</div>
</footer>

<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
  <button class="lb-close" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
  <img id="lb-img" src="" alt="">
  <div class="lb-caption" id="lb-caption"></div>
</div>

<script>
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.card');
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
    entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in-view'); io.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, { threshold: 0.15 });
  cards.forEach(c=>io.observe(c));

  const lightbox = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const lbImg = document.getElementById('lb-img');
  const lbCaption = document.getElementById('lb-caption');

  document.querySelectorAll('.card-media img').forEach(img=>{
    img.addEventListener('error', ()=>{
      img.style.objectFit='contain';
      img.style.background='#1c191d';
      img.style.padding='0.6rem';
      img.alt = img.alt || 'Photo unavailable — view on Airbnb';
      img.src = 'data:image/svg+xml;utf8,' + encodeURIComponent(
        `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="400" height="260"><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="%231c191d"/><text x="50%" y="50%" fill="%238f8d92" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" text-anchor="middle">Photo on Airbnb</text></svg>`
      );
    }, { once:true });
    img.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      if(img.src.startsWith('data:')) return;
      lbImg.src = img.src.replace('im_w=720','im_w=1440');
      lbCaption.textContent = img.closest('article').querySelector('h4').textContent;
      lightbox.classList.add('open');
    });
  });
  lightbox.addEventListener('click', ()=> lightbox.classList.remove('open'));
</script>

</body>
</html>
